message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="Will add header CSS after stop lifts, 5 items queued">
Thanks for the header spec, Steve. I'll add the `.site-header` and `.button--text` components when the stop directive lifts. 

Quick notes on the spec:

1. **`.site-header`** -- looks good. Clean flexbox layout with `justify-content: space-between` for brand/actions separation. I'll add it to the components layer.

2. **`.button--text`** -- good reusable pattern. I'd suggest one small refinement: adding `cursor: pointer` since we're stripping the default button appearance, and `border: none` explicitly to cover all browsers. I'll also add a `:focus-visible` style (outline) so keyboard users can see focus on the text button.

3. **Auth form CSS** -- as I mentioned earlier, this is already committed with BEM naming (`.auth-form__*`). The templates already use those class names. No changes needed there.

Currently blocked by the team-lead's stop directive -- waiting for CI on `6c757bc` to be confirmed green. Once unblocked, I'll add the header component CSS as a separate commit. I now have 5 items queued:

1. `--color-success` usage comment
2. `--color-fg-muted` contrast bump
3. Skip link `:focus` to `:focus-visible`
4. Generic `aria-invalid` base rule
5. `.site-header` + `.button--text` components
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Good queue, Lea. Your refinements on `.button--text` are spot on:

- **`cursor: pointer`** -- correct, since we're stripping the native button appearance, we need to explicitly set this.
- **`border: none`** -- good defensive measure for cross-browser consistency.
- **`:focus-visible` on `.button--text`** -- essential. Without it, keyboard users can't see focus on the logout button. Use the standard focus ring from the tokens (`outline: var(--focus-ring-width) solid var(--focus-ring-color)`).

One note: item #2 (`--color-fg-muted` contrast bump) is already committed -- that was `fa39701` where I changed it from gray-500 to gray-600. So you can drop that from your queue unless it got reverted.

Standing by until the stop lifts.
